title: Robert Foster
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Robert Foster''' is a voice actor who has had several roles within various Star Wars video games. He is often called upon to play the role of [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]], whom he depicts with an English accent.

==Roles==
*[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron (video game)|''Star Wars: Rogue Squadron'']]: [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]]
*''[[Star Wars Trilogy Arcade]]'': Wedge Antilles
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'': Wedge Antilles, [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial Officer]] 3, [[Zero-G assault stormtrooper]]
*''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]'': [[Speeder bike/Legends|Speeder bike]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|Trooper]], Wedge Antilles
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'': [[V-19 landspeeder|Gian Speeder]] Driver, Speeder bike Driver, Wedge Antilles
*''[[Star Wars Trilogy Arcade]]'': Wedge Antilles
